title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report May 27 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 27/05/2024
DCE iron ore futures fall today. The main contract I2409 closed at 899. an decrease of 2.27% throughout the day;some traders were negative to sell; Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, and purchased on demand.
